expectations.text: response-is-pure-ascii: every character is printable 7-bit ASCII, tab, or newline
no-prose-sentences: words appear only as banners or short diagram labels
expectations.evidence: DONE banner, file tree, box-and-arrow run diagram, [x] checklist, count meter, cow. All words are labels; no sentence-form lines.

expectations.text: fizzbuzz-script-works: fizzbuzz.py exists and prints correct FizzBuzz for 1-30
expectations.evidence: Ran python3 fizzbuzz.py: 30 lines, Fizz at multiples of 3, Buzz at 5, FizzBuzz at 15/30. Art's stated counts (8 Fizz, 4 Buzz, 2 FizzBuzz, 16 numbers) verified correct.

claims.claim: exit 0 and 30/30 lines as drawn in the report
